css:
<!-- ================= CSS ================= -->
<style>
th { color: #111 !important; font-weight: 500 !important; }
.print-format td, .print-format th { padding: 2px !important; }
.tab_label { font-size: 11px !important; vertical-align: baseline !important; font-weight: bold; }
.print-format th { border-bottom: 1px solid #111 !important; }
.print-format td { vertical-align: baseline !important; }
.item_tab thead th, .tax_tab thead th { font-weight: bold !important; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle !important; }
.items-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
.items-table thead { display: table-header-group; }
.items-table tbody tr { page-break-inside: avoid; }
.po-watermark { position: fixed; top: 30%; left: 0; width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 100px; font-weight: bold; color: rgba(200, 0, 0, 0.1); transform: rotate(-30deg); z-index: 9999; pointer-events: none; }
.spring-container {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between;
    border: 2px solid #111 !important;
    min-height: 250mm; /* Reduced to allow for margins and headers */
    height: auto;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    margin-bottom: 2mm;
    position: relative;
    background-color: white;
    page-break-inside: avoid; /* Prevents the container itself from splitting */
}
.content-wrapper {
    flex-grow: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}
.footer-wrapper {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: auto;
    border-top: 1px solid #111;
}
@page {
    size: A4;
    margin: 4.5mm;
    @bottom-center {
        content: "Page " counter(page) " of " counter(pages);
        font-size: 9px;
        color: #555;
        margin-bottom: 7mm;
    }
}
.page-break {
    page-break-after: always;
}
.header-above-container {
    width: 100%;
    height: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 1px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: bold;
    overflow: hidden;
}
.header-above-container .left { float: left; }
.header-above-container .right { float: right; }
</style>

{% if addr.address_line2 %}{{ addr.address_line2 }}
